# Public documentation snapshot (synthetic evaluation fixture)

ajq keeps pure jq execution deterministic. Its semantic operations are explicit
in the query and require a selected backend. It is appropriate for filtering
JSON by meaning and classification into supplied bounded labels.

The mock backend is deterministic, in-process, and needs no model, network, or
credentials. Start with capability discovery and plan explanation. Sensitive
and one-off data may use `--no-cache`. General standalone semantic extraction
and redaction are not supported capabilities.
